user.title: Select your Inforcer region
user.description: Choose the region your Inforcer account is hosted in.

api_key.title: Enter your Inforcer API key
api_key.description: Create an API key in the Inforcer UI (Settings > API keys) and paste it here. The key is only shown once when created.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to Inforcer
reauth_confirm.description: The stored Inforcer API key was rejected. It may have expired or been revoked. Create a new key in the Inforcer UI and enter it below.

error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected. Check that it was copied correctly and has not expired or been revoked.
error.rate_limited: The Inforcer API rate limit was reached (429). Wait a moment and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Inforcer API. Check your network connection and the selected region.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while contacting the Inforcer API.

abort.already_configured: This Inforcer region is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: The new Inforcer API key was validated and saved.

init.title: Inforcer options
init.description: Adjust how often data is polled, or rotate your API key before it expires.

data.api_key: New API key (leave blank to keep the current key)

error.invalid_auth: The new API key was rejected. Check that it was copied correctly.
error.rate_limited: The Inforcer API rate limit was reached (429). Wait a moment and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Inforcer API. Check your network connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while contacting the Inforcer API.
